about.title: About Vue Element Template
about.description: An out-of-the-box Vue 3 enterprise frontend template with AI tooling configuration (Claude Code / Cursor).

techStack.title: Complete Modern Frontend Toolchain
techStack.subtitle: From build tooling to UI, state, and i18n — everything is ready out of the box.

aiTools.title: AI Toolchain Integration
aiTools.subtitle: Built-in Claude Code / Cursor config for more efficient AI-assisted development.

claude.title: Claude Code
claude.description: CLAUDE.md, Rules, and Commands for slash-command workflows.

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.description: .cursor/rules and Skills for in-IDE AI-assisted coding.

agents.title: AGENTS.md
agents.description: Universal Agent instructions compatible with major AI dev tools.

cta.title: Want to see it in action?
cta.subtitle: Visit the Demo page to explore the template and quick-start guide.

demo.title: Template Demo
demo.subtitle: This is the Vue Element Template demo environment showcasing components, i18n, and conventions.

themeDemo.title: Light / Dark Mode
themeDemo.subtitle: Toggle light or dark via the nav bar or the button below. Element Plus follows automatically.
themeDemo.hint: You can also use the moon/sun icon in the header

colorDemo.title: Element Plus Primary
colorDemo.subtitle: Pick a preset or custom color; buttons and links update in real time.

i18nDemo.title: Internationalization
i18nDemo.subtitle: Switch locale to update UI copy and route titles.

componentsDemo.title: Element Plus Components
componentsDemo.subtitle: Element Plus is integrated; primary color follows your theme selection.

clone.title: Clone the Repo
clone.description: git clone the repository and cd into the project directory.

install.title: Install Dependencies
install.description: Run npm install to install all packages.

dev.title: Start Dev Server
dev.description: Run npm run dev and open localhost:5173 in your browser.

cta.title: Want the full tech stack?
cta.subtitle: Visit the About page for all integrated tools and AI config details.

hero.title: The minimal toolchain for
hero.subtitle: Strict TypeScript, auto-imports, AI config, Lint CI — zero-config start, focus on product code.

features.title: Developer experience, out of the box
features.subtitle: From scaffolding to conventions — skip repetitive infrastructure work.

typescript.title: Strict TypeScript
typescript.description: vue-tsc type checking and full inference — catch errors before build.

autoImport.title: Auto-imports
autoImport.description: Vue, Pinia, VueUse, composables, and public components — zero imports.

aiReady.title: AI-ready
aiReady.description: Claude Code / Cursor config with AGENTS.md and Skills built in.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: vue-i18n Composition API with EN/ZH locales and type safety.

lint.title: Lint & CI
lint.description: ESLint + Stylelint + Commitlint with Conventional Commits.

deploy.title: One-command build
deploy.description: Vite 7 production builds, multi-env .env, and dev proxy config.

compare.title: Feature comparison
compare.subtitle: Save days of setup vs manual scaffolding or generic boilerplates.

integrations.title: Works with your stack
integrations.subtitle: Integrates with the tools you already use every day.

docsCta.title: Ready to dive into the docs?
docsCta.subtitle: Full API reference, folder conventions, and AI workflow guides — up and running in 5 minutes.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to access RBAC-protected routes and button permission demos.
login.mockHint: Dev mock accounts: admin / admin123 (includes admin:view); viewer / viewer123 (no admin page).

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: Your account does not have the required roles or permissions for this page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Check the URL or return to the home page.

admin.title: RBAC admin demo
admin.subtitle: Welcome, {name}. This page requires admin:view. Buttons below demo v-permission.
